_schema: Per-SKILL × per-question safe-default registry, plus non-SKILL safety channels such as quality_gate. Key = SKILL slug or explicit channel. Inner key = question text or channel decision id. Value = {safe_default: option label/value, rationale: why, allowed_safe_defaults: enum of valid fallback values}. Used by tests/ux-ask-fallback-registry.test.ts to mechanically lock D1 fallback contract — adding a new AskUserQuestion question without registering its safe-default fails the test. Phase 17 US-1705 / Critic round 2 hardening. Plan v3 §3 adds allowed_safe_defaults enum field.
_path_history: Originally proposed skills/_shared/ask-defaults.json (Architect r2 → tests/manifest.test.ts:548 collision) → tests/fixtures/ask-defaults.json (Critic r2 → tests/fixtures.test.ts:38 toBe(40) collision) → final tests/fixtures/ask-defaults/registry.json (subdir bypasses both invariants — non-recursive readdirSync ignores subdir entries).

deploy._note: deploy SKILL Step 3 uses a structured AskUserQuestion JSON block after the 5-field identity preview card. Default behavior in non-interactive subprocess: --dry-run (most conservative).

배포 전 저장 지점을 만들까요?.rationale: Vibe Coder Visibility 갱신 — non-interactive contexts must not run git init/git add/git commit automatically. 'show_commands' option removed in Phase VC because exposing raw git CLI commands to a non-developer surface conflicts with the visibility rules; abort is the only safe default in subprocess mode.

진행할까요?.rationale: non-interactive contexts must not start a real deployment automatically; dry-run preserves the exact preview path without mutating remote state.

axhub CLI 가 더 최신 버전인데 계속할까요?.rationale: Phase VC humanize — original Phase 3.5 question carried '(cli_too_new)' jargon that confused vibe-coder users. Non-interactive default still keeps the deploy moving without mutating user preferences (storing ignore_too_new_until via config_set is a side effect we don't want to apply silently in subprocess context).

품질 게이트가 막았어요. 그래도 진행할까요?.rationale: 품질 게이트는 push 전 설정 불일치 차단 장치라 비대화형 환경에서는 강제 진행하지 않고 중단해요.

이미 배포가 진행 중이에요. 어떻게 할까요?.rationale: Step 1.6a (same-commit duplicate). non-interactive 에서 본인 배포 중복 차단.

다른 사람이 같은 앱에 배포 중일 가능성이 있어요. 어떻게 할까요?.rationale: Step 1.6b (cross-tenant). 다른 사용자 의 in-flight deploy. non-interactive 에서 explicit user intent 없이 mutate 차단. operator notify hint.

배포 중인 게 있는데 누구 건지 확인 중이에요. 어떻게 할까요?.rationale: Step 1.6c (uncertain). commit_sha missing 으로 owner 판단 불가. silent misidentification 차단 위해 explicit uncertainty surface.

다시 로그인할래요?.rationale: Subprocess cannot complete OAuth Device Flow. Abort + tell user to re-run interactively.

로그아웃할래요?.rationale: Logout deletes the local axhub token; subprocess/non-interactive mode must not kill a session automatically.

직전에 잘 됐던 버전으로 다시 올릴까요?.rationale: Forward-fix is destructive deploy_create. Subprocess must not auto-rollback without explicit human confirm.

다른 팀 API도 볼래요? 권한 있는 모든 API 주소를 보여줄 수 있지.rationale: Privacy-first: never widen scope to cross-team without explicit human consent (PLAN row 46 audit log requirement).

앱이 더 있어요. 전체 목록 볼래요?.rationale: Top 10 sufficient for vibe-coder browse; full list rarely needed in non-interactive.

앱을 삭제할까요?.rationale: 앱 삭제는 되돌리기 어려운 파괴적 작업이라 비대화형 환경에서는 항상 삭제를 멈춰요.

어떤 작업 원해요?.rationale: Ambiguous intent in non-interactive context — agent cannot guess; surface ambiguity message and stop.

여러 항목 점검 필요해요. 어디부터 고쳐요?.rationale: Diagnosis output sufficient in non-interactive; subprocess should not auto-trigger remediation.

axhub CLI 가 설치되어 있지 않아요. 지금 설치할까요?.rationale: CLI install in subprocess (claude -p / CI / headless) writes new system binaries without explicit user consent. Non-interactive mode must surface the diagnosis and stop, never auto-route to install-cli SKILL.

axhub CLI 업그레이드해요?.rationale: Binary replacement is destructive; non-interactive subprocess must not auto-upgrade.

플러그인 업그레이드 명령 보여줄까요?.rationale: Read-only display action, safe in subprocess. Show the upgrade command without executing it.

logs._note: logs SKILL uses inline AskUserQuestion narration ('빌드 로그 / 런타임 로그 / 둘 다') without a structured JSON block. Default = build (most common failure-mode use case). Test parses 'AskUserQuestion (...)' inline literal and falls back to logs.* defaults below.

status._note: status SKILL delegates AskUserQuestion sites to recovery-flows.md (cold-cache deploy pick) and error-empathy-catalog.md (exit-65 re-login). Defaults handled at delegation point.

어떤 템플릿으로 시작할까요?.rationale: Template choice creates files. Non-interactive subprocess must not scaffold without an explicit human selection.

dependency_install_strategy.rationale: Claude Code 세션 비대화형/headless 환경 fallback. inline 실행은 사용자 동의 필요해요.

package_manager_choice.rationale: lockfile 다중 시 자동 결정 위험. 사용자 explicit 선택 필요해요.

어떤 환경변수 작업을 할까요?.rationale: Env set/delete can mutate secrets. Non-interactive mode may list masked keys only.

GitHub 연동 작업을 고를까요?.rationale: GitHub connect/disconnect changes deployment source bindings. Non-interactive mode should only list available repos. GitHub disconnect 외 모든 옵션 (skip 포함) 은 backend 가 git_connection_required (HTTP 422) 로 거절. 모델이 4번째 'skip' 옵션을 만들어내면 안 돼요.

GitHub repo 를 만들까요?.rationale: Repository creation mutates GitHub state and visibility. Non-interactive mode must not create repos without explicit human confirmation.

git remote 를 추가할까요?.rationale: Adding a remote changes local repository configuration. Non-interactive mode must leave git remotes untouched.

첫 push 를 실행할까요?.rationale: First push publishes local code to GitHub. Non-interactive mode must not push without explicit human confirmation.

axhub 앱에 repo 를 연결할까요?.rationale: Connecting a repo changes the app deployment source. Non-interactive mode must stop before connect.

open._note: open SKILL is read-only and has no structured AskUserQuestion site. It only calls axhub open/URL display paths.

whatsnew._note: whatsnew SKILL is read-only and has no structured AskUserQuestion site. It summarizes axhub whatsnew output.

프로필 작업을 고를까요?.rationale: Profile add/use changes endpoint context. Non-interactive mode may only show the current profile.

axhub CLI 어떤 채널로 설치해요?.rationale: Auto-running an installer in subprocess (claude -p / CI / headless) writes new system binaries without explicit user consent. Non-interactive mode must surface install commands only, never execute them.

다음에 뭘 볼까요?.rationale: Routing stats is read-only, but non-interactive sessions should not open docs or run extra confused/audit commands unless the user can choose them.

trace._note: Phase 25 PR 25.4 trace SKILL. event_log + build_log + audit 3-source 통합 실패 추적. interactive=AskUserQuestion / non-interactive=abort (대상 모호 시 안전하게 중단).

최근 Failed 배포가 여러 개예요. 어떤 거 추적할까요?.rationale: 비대화형 환경에서 대상 deploy 가 모호하면 추적 중단. 잘못된 deploy_id 로 trace 호출 시 빈 결과 + 사용자 혼란 방지. interactive 환경에서만 가장 최근/직접 입력 선택 허용.

verify._note: Phase 26 PR 26.4 verify SKILL. axhub status + logs tail evidence 기반 verdict. interactive=AskUserQuestion 헬스 endpoint setup / non-interactive=skip (status+logs 만으로 verdict).

헬스 endpoint 가 설정 안 돼 있어요. 지금 설정해서 더 깊게 검.rationale: 헬스 endpoint 미설정 시 비대화형 환경에선 axhub status + logs tail 만으로 verdict 결정. interactive 환경에서만 사용자에게 setup 묻기.

quality_gate._note: Phase 26 PR 26.3 quality_gate non-SKILL safety channel. deploy-prep emits this gate before mutation; interactive flow can ask abort/proceed, non-interactive always aborts.

abort_or_proceed.rationale: 비대화형 환경에서 잘못된 push 차단 우선. interactive 환경에서만 사용자 선택을 허용해요.

statusLine 어떻게 켤래요?.rationale: Wiring snippet 표시는 idempotent read-only 라 user explicit consent 없는 비대화형 환경에서도 stdout 출력 안전해요. 다만 clipboard mutation 은 interactive 선택 후에만 진행해요. Windows native 4번째 옵션도 stdout 만 출력해요 (clipboard 미사용). v0.5.13 부터 `복사해서 붙여 넣을래요` 옵션은 axhub-helpers settings-merge --apply 자동 wire 호출, 7-branch atomic + .bak rollback 으로 safe. v0.6.3 부터 `이 repo 만 켤래요 (project scope, dotfiles 비추천)` 옵션은 project `.claude/settings.json` 에 paste 할 snippet 만 stdout 출력해요 — autowire 안 함, $HOME 절대경로 commit 위험 SKILL 본문에 warn.
allowed_safe_defaults: 이 repo 만 켤래요 (project scope, dotfiles 비추천)
